---
title: "Within-Cohort Differential Communication Phenotypes (H&N)"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
---

This notebook runs **within-cohort** scDiffCom post-analysis for a single Head & Neck dataset.
Edit [`config/within_cohort_config.R`](config/within_cohort_config.R) (`TARGET_DATASET`) before knitting.

See [README.md](README.md) for outputs and run instructions.

```{r setup-within-cohort, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE,
  message = TRUE,
  warning = TRUE,
  fig.width = 10,
  fig.height = 7
)

WITHIN_COHORT_DIR <- normalizePath(".", winslash = "/")
POST_ANALYSIS_DIR <- normalizePath(file.path(WITHIN_COHORT_DIR, ".."), winslash = "/")
PROJECT_SCRIPTS   <- normalizePath(file.path(POST_ANALYSIS_DIR, "..", ".."), winslash = "/")

source(file.path(PROJECT_SCRIPTS, "utils/Utils.R"))
source(file.path(PROJECT_SCRIPTS, "utils/my.utils.R"))
source(file.path(POST_ANALYSIS_DIR, "R/00_setup.R"))
source(file.path(POST_ANALYSIS_DIR, "R/01_load_filter.R"))
source(file.path(POST_ANALYSIS_DIR, "config/hnsc_datasets.R"))
source(file.path(POST_ANALYSIS_DIR, "R/03_lri_helpers.R"))
source(file.path(WITHIN_COHORT_DIR, "config/within_cohort_config.R"))
source(file.path(WITHIN_COHORT_DIR, "R/04_within_cohort_helpers.R"))

dir.create(WITHIN_COHORT_OUTPUT_DIR, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
OUTPUT_DIR <- WITHIN_COHORT_OUTPUT_DIR

if (!TARGET_DATASET %in% HNSC_DATASETS) {
  stop("TARGET_DATASET must be one of: ", paste(HNSC_DATASETS, collapse = ", "))
}

DATASET_SHORT <- ds_short_map[[TARGET_DATASET]]

library(ggplot2)
library(ggrepel)
library(gplots)
library(umap)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(scales)

message("Within-cohort analysis for: ", TARGET_DATASET,
        " (", DATASET_SHORT, ") → ", WITHIN_COHORT_OUTPUT_DIR)
```

```{r child = "sections/01_load_dataset.Rmd"}
```

```{r child = "sections/02_axl_boxplot.Rmd"}
```

```{r child = "sections/03_gene_gene_lri.Rmd"}
```

<!-- Fisher + volcano disabled (slow). Uncomment when ready:
```{r child = "sections/04_gobp_fisher_volcano.Rmd"}
```
-->
